name: Cranberry Honey Mustard
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups Dried cranberries (available in health-food and gourmet stores)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the mustard seeds, cider vinegar, and dried cranberries in a non-aluminum pot or jar. Cover and let it sit for 48 hours, adding more vinegar if needed to keep the ingredients submerged.
2. Scrape the soaked mixture into a food processor. Process until the mixture becomes creamy, incorporating seed and cranberry pieces.
3. Add honey and salt. Blend for at least 3-4 minutes until smooth, adding more vinegar as necessary to achieve a creamy consistency. The mustard will thicken slightly after standing.
4. Allow the mustard to age for about one week for optimal flavor, but it can be used immediately if desired. This recipe yields approximately 3 1/3 cups of mustard.
